scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rmg-creator-os/types build && pnpm --filter @rmg-creator-os/integrations build && pnpm --filter @rmg-creator-os/db build && pnpm -r --if-present build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @rmg-creator-os/types build && pnpm --filter @rmg-creator-os/integrations build && pnpm --filter @rmg-creator-os/db build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
